name: Super Dimentio
description:
When the dimensions were about to be destroyed, the hero of green play his last card against the jester, making his conscience awake in the monster and chaining himself and Dimentio in this new form for all the eternity.

Now, somehow you end in the empty space between dimensions, and you find the beast in this emptiness.

I got the inspiration after watch Fiona and Cake.
creator: Ant00
